raw.title: Introducing Dark Mountain: Issue 29
raw.excerpt:
Welcome to our new Spring anthology, the first issue we've devoted entitely to animals, now available in our online shop. Today we share the editorial and a glimpse of Amy Guidry's eye-catching cover image.

The post Introducing Dark Mountain: Issue 29 appeared first on Dark Mountain.

llm_processed.summary: An introduction to the Dark Mountain Project's zine and its focus on artistic exploration of uncertainty and collapse.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This enables a bridge between artistic expression and ecological restoration by highlighting the need for collaborative storytelling and experimentation in the face of environmental collapse.
